title: BETA_ - Inspiration_YTPMV_11.13_Ver.
description:
I'm joining the collab guys

I made this mainly because of inspiration by peers DWL and Dutchy, and because I was inspired to use

Rob's sources
Orlo (ESPECIALLY THIS ONE THANKS SHAKE)
Pokemon sources (Thanks SashicX10)
Hermit camsources
Uguu~
MGM (Thanks LEor, also yeah Rob feel free to whine about instruments, etc.)
the Hitler source (Thanks Xars)

This is probably not as good as DWL and Dutchy's and all the previous ytpmvs of this song, and once again I keep rushing myself for no reason.

The way the visuals develop in this ytpmv can be a reflection of how my motivation and creativity decreases as I get through making a ytpmv.
